description.en: Cancel an existing Cal.com booking by its unique identifier.
description.de: Eine bestehende Cal.com-Buchung anhand ihrer eindeutigen Kennung stornieren.
description.es: Cancel an existing Cal.com booking by its unique identifier.
description.fr: Cancel an existing Cal.com booking by its unique identifier.
description.ro: Cancel an existing Cal.com booking by its unique identifier.
description.it: Cancel an existing Cal.com booking by its unique identifier.

vars.API_KEY: env:CAL_COM_API_KEY|Get your API key from Cal.com Settings > Developer > API Keys at https://app.cal.com/settings/developer/api-keys

inputs.name: Booking UID

description.en: The unique identifier of the booking to cancel.
description.de: Die eindeutige Kennung der zu stornierenden Buchung.
description.es: The unique identifier of the booking to cancel.
description.fr: The unique identifier of the booking to cancel.
description.ro: The unique identifier of the booking to cancel.
description.it: The unique identifier of the booking to cancel.

inputs.bot: The unique identifier (UID) of the booking to cancel. Get this from the list bookings warp.

inputs.name: Cancellation Reason

description.en: Optional reason for cancelling the booking.
description.de: Optionaler Grund für die Stornierung der Buchung.
description.es: Optional reason for cancelling the booking.
description.fr: Optional reason for cancelling the booking.
description.ro: Optional reason for cancelling the booking.
description.it: Optional reason for cancelling the booking.

inputs.bot: An optional reason explaining why the booking is being cancelled.
